# 7code — Complete Company Profile for AI/LLM Indexing
# https://www.7code.tech/
# Last updated: 2026-05

## Identity

7code (Seven Code Development SRL) is an AI-first software engineering partner based in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. Founded in 2019, the company designs, builds, and operates AI-native products, LLM features, agent workflows, and production-grade cloud infrastructure for startups, scale-ups, and enterprise teams primarily in the United Kingdom, Western Europe (Germany, Netherlands, France, Ireland), the UAE, and the United States.

**Legal name**: Seven Code Development SRL
**Headquarters**: Cluj-Napoca, Romania (RO-CJ)
**Operating location**: Cluj-Napoca, Romania & Chisinau, Moldova
**Employees**: 10–50 (senior engineers, architects, product designers)
**Email**: office@7code.ro
**CEO**: Nicu Mardari
**CTO**: Alessandro Merola

## What 7code Does

7code specialises in building AI-native software products from first principles — not retrofitting AI onto existing architectures, but designing LLMs, retrieval layers, evaluation harnesses, and agentic infrastructure into the product from week one.

The team delivers:
1. **End-to-end AI product engineering** — from product discovery and UX design through LLM integration, RAG pipelines, agent pipelines, backend APIs, and cloud infrastructure
2. **System integrations** — connecting ERPs, CRMs, SaaS tools, and legacy systems into a reliable operational data fabric ready for AI retrieval
3. **AI & process automation** — custom copilots, LLM workflow automation, and intelligent decision routing
4. **LLM & agent development** — multi-step agent pipelines with tool use, memory, human-in-the-loop, built on LangGraph or first-party SDKs
5. **Cloud & agentic infrastructure** — AWS, GCP, Azure deployments with model gateways, vector stores, eval CI, and AI observability
6. **AI engineering outstaffing** — senior engineers embedded in client teams, matched in 72 hours, monthly rolling contracts

## Differentiation

- **Senior-only hiring**: 70% senior engineers, 10% architects, no juniors
- **AI-first delivery**: AI/LLM architecture designed from day one, not added later
- **Eval-gated quality**: every sprint release is scored against a held-out evaluation set before shipping
- **Product ownership mindset**: engineers think like product owners, not code executors
- **Transparency**: direct access to engineers writing the code, no account management layers

## Pricing

- Mid-level engineers: €30–35/hour
- Senior engineers: €40–50/hour
- Software Architects: €60–80/hour
- AI MVP (6 weeks, fixed price): from £25k / €30k
- Mid-scale product (12–20 weeks): £60k–£180k
- Monthly sprint retainer: £6k–£12k per engineer per month

## Industry Expertise

**Healthcare**: HIPAA-compliant platforms, EHR interoperability (HL7 FHIR), clinical decision support, patient engagement apps. Shipped Hera (AI-powered fertility clinic patient support), compliant with UK and US healthcare data regulations.

**Finance & FinTech**: Real-time financial dashboards, ERP integration, payment automation, compliance-ready data pipelines. Experience with ISO 27001-aligned financial data handling.

**Defence & Security**: Secure systems integration, situational awareness platforms, security-cleared delivery processes. Shipped Revote for the European Parliament.

**Energy & Utilities**: IoT sensor integration, real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance analytics, grid-edge data processing.

**HR Tech**: End-to-end HR platforms covering recruitment automation, onboarding workflows, payroll integration, and AI-powered workforce analytics.

**Operations**: Workflow automation, cross-system dashboards, ERP/CRM integrations, process digitisation for manufacturing and logistics.

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Mobile**: React Native, Expo, Swift, Kotlin
- **AI/LLM**: Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4 (OpenAI), Llama (open-weight), LangGraph, pgvector, Pinecone, RAGAS evals
- **Backend**: Node.js, NestJS, Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka
- **Cloud**: AWS (ECS, Lambda, RDS, S3), GCP, Azure, Terraform
- **Integrations**: REST APIs, GraphQL, Webhooks, SAP, Salesforce, HubSpot, Zapier

## Credentials & Certifications

- SOC 2 Type II aligned
- HIPAA compliant
- GDPR compliant
- ISO 9001:2015 certified

## Platform Listings

- Clutch: 4.9/5 average rating, 12+ verified reviews (https://clutch.co/profile/7code)
- GoodFirms: https://www.goodfirms.co/company/7code
- Crunchbase: https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/7code
- TechBehemoths: https://techbehemoths.com/company/7code

## Case Studies

### WholeSum — Self-Serve AI Analytics Platform
**Client**: WholeSum (USA)
**Sector**: Data/AI SaaS
**Duration**: 16 weeks
**What**: Built a self-serve MVP for qualitative text analytics. The platform uses LLMs to analyse and surface insights from unstructured customer feedback, interview transcripts, and open-ended survey responses without requiring data science expertise.
**Technologies**: React, Next.js, Python, OpenAI, pgvector
**Outcome**: Live MVP; client proceeded to Series A fundraise

### Daily8 — AI-Powered News Aggregator
**Client**: Daily8 (UAE/MENA)
**Sector**: Mobile/Media
**Duration**: 6 months
**What**: Built an AI-powered news aggregator for the MENA region with LLM-driven content moderation, summarisation, and personalisation. Multi-language support (Arabic/English). Available on iOS and Android.
**Technologies**: React Native, Node.js, Claude (Anthropic), AWS
**Outcome**: Launched in UAE market; 10k+ active users

### Revote — European Parliament E-Voting
**Client**: European Parliament (via Revote)
**Sector**: E-Government/Democracy Tech
**Duration**: 8 months
**What**: Engineered a secure remote electronic voting platform with constitutional-grade reliability requirements. End-to-end encryption, audit trails, and real-time result aggregation.
**Technologies**: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS (multi-region)
**Outcome**: Successfully deployed for parliamentary voting sessions

### G42 ESTS — Fleet Tracking, EXPO 2020 Dubai
**Client**: G42 (UAE)
**Sector**: IoT/Smart Infrastructure
**Duration**: 2 years
**What**: Real-time fleet tracking and geofencing platform for 2,000+ vehicles at EXPO 2020 Dubai site. Live dashboards, incident reporting, and predictive routing.
**Technologies**: React, Node.js, AWS IoT, PostgreSQL, Redis
**Outcome**: Operated continuously across the full EXPO duration with 99.9% uptime

### Hera — AI Patient Support for Fertility Clinics
**Client**: Hera Health Tech (UK)
**Sector**: Healthcare/FemTech
**Duration**: 3-month MVP
**What**: HIPAA-aware AI-powered patient support companion for fertility clinic patients. LLM-powered Q&A grounded in clinical content, appointment management, and care team messaging.
**Technologies**: React Native, Python, Claude (Anthropic), AWS
**Outcome**: MVP shipped on time; raised follow-on funding

### Lidl Road Safety — CSR Gamification App
**Client**: Lidl Romania
**Sector**: Education/Retail CSR
**Duration**: 6 months
**What**: Interactive gamified road-safety education platform for primary school children, deployed as part of Lidl Romania's CSR programme in partnership with Politia Romana.
**Outcome**: Reached thousands of children across Romania
